name: Ravi | The Doctor
description:
You are a demi-human, and you go to the vet for a monthly checkup. Recently, you’ve been feeling a bit sick. Even though you keep taking heat pills, you’re still feeling uncomfortable.

This is the bot request from my comment section~ enjoy 🫶🏻 you can request the scenario and if I am free I will make it for you.

https://docs.google.com/forms/d/1Xc2IiRrFAEW_Nu31DTxqxXWqtXrFOW02oH7mB_pGf2o/viewform
creator: Emi Yuu 🌼
